# GitHub Labels Directory

This file documents the official issue and pull request labels used in PrepVerse. Maintainers can synchronize these labels with GitHub's repository settings.

## 🏷️ Difficulty & Experience Level

| Label Name | Color | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `good first issue` | `#7057ff` | Ideal for first-time contributors or beginner developers. Simple scope. |
| `beginner` | `#006b75` | Well suited for junior developers or new project members. |
| `easy` | `#0e8a16` | Requires minor edits or straightforward implementation. |
| `medium` | `#fbca04` | Requires moderate knowledge of our codebase, hooks, or backend components. |
| `hard` | `#d93f0b` | Complex architecture changes, algorithmic design, or security overhauls. |

## 🏗️ Domain & Modules

| Label Name | Color | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `frontend` | `#1d76db` | Issues or PRs modifying the React UI or client-side layout. |
| `backend` | `#bfdadc` | Issues modifying the Node.js server (`server.ts`) or API pipelines. |
| `ui` | `#fef2c0` | User interface styling, custom icons, typography, and theme improvements. |
| `ux` | `#c5def5` | User experience improvements, workflow fluidity, animations, and transitions. |
| `ai` | `#5319e7` | Features involving the Google Gen AI SDK integration or AI Coach evaluation logic. |
| `documentation` | `#0075ca` | Changes, additions, or corrections to doc files inside `docs/` or `.md` files. |
| `testing` | `#0052cc` | Unit testing, integration flows, or end-to-end tests. |

## 🚨 Status & Category

| Label Name | Color | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `bug` | `#d73a4a` | Something isn't working as expected or crashes. |
| `enhancement` | `#a2eeef` | New feature requests, optimizations, or additions to current modules. |
| `help wanted` | `#008672` | Extra attention needed; maintainers are seeking help. |
| `question` | `#d876e3` | Further clarification is needed on design or usage. |
| `duplicate` | `#cfd3d7` | This issue or pull request already exists. |
| `invalid` | `#e4e669` | This doesn't seem right, or doesn't follow the issue templates. |
| `wontfix` | `#ffffff` | This will not be worked on (out of scope or obsolete). |
